title: ageratina juxtlahuacensis
intro: Ageratina juxtlahuacensis, also known as Juxtlahuaca ageratina or Juxtlahuacan mountain tea, is a plant species native to Mexico and Guatemala. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Ageratina juxtlahuacensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and fighting infections. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as being used in tinctures and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties.
